_comment: Ideated measure set for 4th & Madison decarb plan (P3 hero content). Each measure cites its capture end-use (from capture_map) and its per-measure energy delta in kWh + kWh/m2 only, per reporting standard. Phased roadmap ties Phase 2/3 to natural equipment-replacement triggers rather than forcing an all-at-once retrofit.

measures.name: Envelope Upgrade -- low-e glazing film + perimeter air sealing
measures.description: Applies low-e window film to the curtain wall and air-seals perimeter joints across all 22 floors, reducing heating load on the central hydronic loop ahead of Phase 3 electrification. Sized to reduce heating fuel input by 10%.
measures.capacity_or_scope: 83,000 m2 curtain wall / perimeter zone treatment
measures.source_citation: Site audit walk-through + AFHA report cross-walk (P1) -- see citations.json

measures.name: Chiller Plant Upgrade -- high-efficiency VFD water-cooled chiller
measures.description: Replaces the 2010-vintage water-cooled chiller (2,200 tons) with a high-efficiency variable-frequency-drive chiller at end of its expected service life (~Year 3), cutting cooling electricity ~13% relative to baseline cooling load. Bundled with the envelope's residual cooling-side benefit for reporting simplicity.
measures.source_citation: Site audit equipment inventory (P1) -- see citations.json

measures.name: Central Plant Heat Pump Electrification -- air-to-water ASHP replacing hydronic furnace
measures.description: Replaces the existing central_plant_heater (hydronic_furnace, 600-ton equivalent, installed 2003, at end of service life ~Year 6) with an air-to-water air-source heat pump (COP 3.2) serving the existing fan_coil_units terminal distribution. This is the hero electrification measure -- it eliminates ~90% of the building's remaining space-heating gas load, with the residual carried as electric-resistance backup for design-day peaks (folded into the electric addition below for simplicity).
measures.capacity_or_scope: 600-ton equivalent air-to-water ASHP, COP 3.2, retains existing fan_coil_units distribution
measures.source_citation: AFHA 2020 condition assessment cross-walk + Audette custom plan (P1/P3) -- see citations.json

measures.name: DHW Heat Pump Water Heater
measures.description: Replaces the central gas_heater domestic hot water plant (centrally distributed) with a heat-pump water heater (COP 3.0), sized to the existing central distribution loop. Near-breakeven on opex (gas $ saved roughly offset by electricity $ added at current blended rates) -- value is carbon/BPS-driven, not opex-driven.
measures.capacity_or_scope: Central HPWH plant, COP 3.0, retains existing central distribution
measures.source_citation: Site audit DHW plant inventory (P1) -- see citations.json

measures.name: Lighting Retrofit + BAS/RCx Controls Subscription
measures.description: LED lighting retrofit across common areas, garage, and base-building corridors, paired with an ongoing retro-commissioning (RCx) controls subscription (Parity RCx-like) that continuously tunes BAS setpoints and schedules. The subscription fee is tracked separately from the gross utility savings it enables, per the value-creation waterfall convention.
measures.capacity_or_scope: Full common-area LED conversion + continuous RCx subscription
measures.source_citation: Lighting audit + BAS trend review (P1) -- see citations.json

measures.name: Rooftop Solar PV (500 kWp, VNM net metering)
measures.description: 500 kWp rooftop array under a virtual net metering (VNM) arrangement. Generation offsets purchased electricity 1:1 at the meter; per the VNM revenue-sharing convention 80% of the value flows to the landlord (owner_capture_pct 0.80 in capture_map), with the remaining 20% flowing to tenants/other VNM subscribers.
measures.trigger: Bundled with Phase 2 (roof access during chiller plant work)
measures.source_citation: Roof structural/solar feasibility review (P1) -- see citations.json

roadmap_phases.label: Near-term, low disruption (Year 1)
roadmap_phases.trigger: No forced equipment trigger -- executed on hold-period start to capture quick paybacks and stage the BAS/RCx baseline ahead of later phases.

roadmap_phases.label: Chiller replacement cycle + Solar PV (Year 3)
roadmap_phases.trigger: Chiller reaches end of expected service life (~Year 3); roof access reused for solar array install.

roadmap_phases.label: Central plant electrification (Year 6)
roadmap_phases.trigger: Central hydronic furnace (hydronic_furnace, installed 2003) reaches end of service life (~Year 6, est. 2032) -- coincides with the BPS first compliance year.

gap_statement: The full three-phase plan reduces site emissions 21% from baseline (3,600 -> 2,800 tCO2e/yr) and site energy 28% (135 -> 98 kWh/m2/yr), fully eliminating gas consumption by Year 6. This closes most, but not all, of the gap to the Metro City BPS first-compliance cap (30 kgCO2e/m2/yr): post-plan intensity is 34 kgCO2e/m2/yr against a 30 kgCO2e/m2/yr cap, leaving a residual ~350 tCO2e/yr of fine exposure at the modeled rate ($268/tCO2e) that would require a further measure (e.g. additional on-site or off-site renewable procurement) to fully close.
